x.name: Deedy Das
x.bio:
Partner at @MenloVentures. ex-founding Glean, Google Search. Cornell CS. 
Investor: Anthropic, OpenRouter, Modal, WisprFlow, Inception, Goodfire, PrimeIntellect

tweets.text:
I know a lot of these are underreported revenue numbers!

Some are genuine mistakes (Arena is at $100M). For others, I try to only use public sources for revenue and valuation, including rumors. If you want to correct any, what’s most helpful is just telling me the correct number and a source so I can fix in the next version.

Listing out some of the others I missed:

Data marketplaces: Kled, Luel

Computer / browser use: Chakra Labs, Habitat, Refresh, Cua, Originator, Dojo

Coding / SWE: Proximal, Idler, Calaveras, BenchFlow, Vmax

Long-horizon / reasoning: Andromede, Aviro, AIChamp, General Reasoning, Champ, Haladir, Hillclimb

Model behavior / evals: Gray Swan, Theta, Preference Model, Vals AI, Andon Labs, Verita, Good Start Labs

Domain-specific: Halluminate, Quesma, Phinity, Rise Data Labs, Kairos, TrainLoop, Huzzle Labs

If there's any startups I missed or any numbers you have issues with, please let me know and I'll fix them in the next iteration. Really hard to get these to be perfect, but I've taken the perfect is the enemy of the good approach to some of these lists because some find them valuable
